specific_question: By December 31, 2025, will Elexion Automotive integrate augmented reality (AR) headsets for technician training at its Texas assembly facility?
answer: Yes. A pilot program beginning in November 2025 will introduce AR headsets to improve on-the-job training for maintenance staff at the Texas plant.
dr_question: How can Elexion Automotive use real-time data from IoT sensors embedded in vehicles and manufacturing equipment, combined with digital engineering-enabled digital twins, to enhance predictive maintenance and minimize downtime in production lines by the end of 2025?
